page_metadata.biotools__summary: Artistoo (Artificial Tissue Toolbox, formerly called CPMjs) is a framework that lets you build interactive, explorable simulation models of cells and tissues in the web browser.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Artistoo (Artificial Tissue Toolbox, formerly called CPMjs) is a framework that lets you build interactive, explorable simulation models of cells and tissues in the web browser.
